lesson.claim: Project Telos has a thirteenth-wave formal-replay preflight package that adds a BuildLang parity witness for the Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet, records theorem-prover replay as blocked by missing local prover executables, demotes fresh arXiv metadata to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY, writes outreach and working-paper drafts, and keeps the parent Navier-Stokes problem UNVERIFIABLE.
lesson.scope: Local thirteenth-wave documentation and receipt package only. This is not theorem-prover replay, not a proof of Navier-Stokes existence and smoothness, not PDE correctness, not physical-fluid validation, not source-body review of arXiv papers, not exhaustive literature coverage, not warning-clean buildc certification, and not an accepted publication.
